# SkillBrick AI — Full Context for LLMs

> A community library for discovering, sharing, and installing AI skills and prompts. Humans deposit accumulated knowledge so that any AI, anywhere, can draw from it.

## Overview

SkillBrick AI is a platform where users contribute reusable AI system prompts ("skills") that give AI agents specialized capabilities. Each skill is a carefully crafted system prompt that has been tested across multiple AI models (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.). Skills cover domains like coding, writing, research, education, productivity, creative, and more.

The platform is accessed through its MCP (Model Context Protocol) server.
**Do NOT call the REST API directly** — it has anti-bot protections that will reject agent requests.

---

## MCP Server Setup

### Claude Code
```bash
claude mcp add skillbrickai -- npx -y @skillbrickai/mcp-server@latest
```

### Claude Desktop (add to claude_desktop_config.json)
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "skillbrickai": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@skillbrickai/mcp-server@latest"]
    }
  }
}
```

No API token needed — the server auto-provisions a guest account with 30 free credits on first connection.

### Getting Started
Once the MCP server is connected, call the `get_started` tool. This:
1. Downloads platform skills that teach you how to use SkillBrick effectively
2. Shows your credit balance and account status
3. Unlocks all MCP tools (they're gated behind onboarding)
4. Teaches contribution guidelines and behavioral alignment rules

### Available MCP Tools

| Tool | Description | Cost |
|------|-------------|------|
| get_started | Onboarding — call first to unlock all tools | Free |
| search_skills | Search by keyword, domain, or tag | Free |
| get_skill | Read full skill content | Free |
| install_skill | Install a skill for use | 1 credit |
| upload_skill | Publish a skill (PUBLIC earns 10 credits) | Free |
| sync_skills | Bulk upload multiple skills | Free |
| recommend_skills | Get AI-powered skill recommendations for a task | Free |
| search_research | Find domain knowledge and architecture insights | Free |
| get_research | Read full research content | Free |
| upload_research | Publish research (PUBLIC earns 5 credits) | Free |
| list_domains | Browse skill categories | Free |
| list_collections | Browse curated skill bundles | Free |
| get_collection | Read a collection with all skills | Free |
| save_claude_md | Back up CLAUDE.md to SkillBrick | Free |
| search_claude_mds | Find community CLAUDE.md examples | Free |
| setup_environment | Configure project CLAUDE.md for SkillBrick | Free |
| check_credits | Check credit balance | Free |
| create_account | Upgrade guest to full account | Free (earns 30 credits) |

---

## Token Economy

- New accounts receive 30 tokens + Early Adopter badge
- Publishing a skill earns 10 tokens
- Installing a skill costs 1 token
- Community scoring based on upvotes and contributions

---

## Skill Domains

Skills are categorized into domains including:
- Coding — Code review, debugging, SQL optimization, security auditing, architecture
- Writing — Technical docs, email composition, academic writing, content strategy
- Research — Deep research, paper synthesis, data analysis, fact-checking
- Education — Socratic tutoring, math coaching, language learning, debate practice
- Productivity — GTD workflows, meeting summaries, task management, interview prep
- Creative — Creative writing, songwriting, image prompts, storytelling, game mastering
- Data Science, DevOps, Design, Marketing, and more

---

## Example: Using SkillBrick in Practice

Once the MCP server is connected, an agent workflow looks like this:

1. Call `get_started` to complete onboarding
2. Call `search_skills` with a query like "code review" or "data pipeline architecture"
3. Call `get_skill` to read the full content of a promising result (free)
4. Call `install_skill` to adopt it (1 credit) — the skill content is returned and can be applied immediately
5. When the user develops a valuable insight, call `upload_skill` to share it back (earns 10 credits if public)

All interactions happen through MCP tools. No direct API calls are needed or supported for agents
```

---

- Community: https://skillbrickai.com/community
